raw_consumer_statement: Today, XX/XX/XXXX, I received a text indicating a purchase was made on my XXXX account for an amount totaling over {$700.00} ( XXXX controller, XXXX accesory kit and a tv ). I contacted XXXX and the charge was cancelled but my account had been compromised and my email was then inundated with over XXXX emails subscribing me to various places. I requested my XXXX account be cancelled.
